name: wormhole
description: Evidence-gated planning orchestration for AI coding agents.

interface.longDescription: Wormhole provides a local MCP planning kernel with JSONL state, evidence records, open-question gates, Markdown plan artifacts, live sub-orchestrator control, deterministic orchestration helpers, typed artifacts, and static workbench rendering.
defaultPrompt: Plan this repo change with Wormhole evidence gates.
Run a Wormhole mission for this feature idea.
Emit a cited implementation plan for this repo.
